(DEVICE FILE: DIODEBI_DIRTRIG_ESD0402_RL040 - used for device: 'DIODE BI_DIR TRIG_ESD0402_RL040')

PACKAGE ESD0402
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 2

PINORDER 'DIODE BI_DIR TRIG_ESD0402_RL040' 1 2
FUNCTION G1 'DIODE BI_DIR TRIG_ESD0402_RL040' 1 2

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME 'DIODE BI_DIR TRIG'
PACKAGEPROP VALUE RL0402E005M015K

END
